notes: Validated LowHighGenerator n_log at builder/deserialization/generator boundaries; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- malformed_low_high_generator; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 range_check --lib.

QuotientGeneratorExtension uses try_inverse and returns generator failure for zero extension denominators; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- zero_denominator; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 arithmetic_extension --lib.

exp_from_bits rejects exponent vectors beyond ExponentiationGate capacity and wire helpers assert in release; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness --release -- oversized_exp_from_bits; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- exp_from_bits; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 exponentiation --lib.

CosetInterpolationGate now constrains shift * shift_inverse = 1 and InterpolationGenerator uses try_inverse for zero-shift proving errors; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- interpolation_generator_zero_shift; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- interpolation_generator_nonzero_shift; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 coset_interpolation --lib.

ReducingGate and ReducingExtensionGate reject num_coeffs == 0 in constructors and deserializers; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- zero_coeff_reducing_gate; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 reducing --lib.

Serialized FFT root tables are shape-checked against the expected table and discarded in favor of recomputation from CommonCircuitData; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- malformed_fft_root_table; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- valid_fft_root_table; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 fft --lib.

ZeroPolyOnCoset has a bounded try_new constructor with checked shifts/domain checks and prover paths use it; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- zero_poly_on_coset; cargo test -p qp-plonky2-field zero_poly --lib; cargo check -p starky.

FriInstanceInfo::check_references validates oracle and polynomial indices before FRI proof shape verification; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- malformed_fri_oracle_metadata; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- valid_fri_oracle_metadata; cargo test -p qp-plonky2-core fri --lib; cargo test -p qp-plonky2-verifier fri --lib.

FriParams::check_valid rejects malformed Split final-polynomial layouts and deserializers/common-data validation call it; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- split_final_poly_layout; cargo test -p qp-plonky2-core fri --lib; cargo test -p qp-plonky2-verifier fri --lib.

CommonCircuitData validation now requires public_initial_degree_bits to match FriParams degree_bits during direct validation and deserialization; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- fri_degree_bits; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 circuit_data --lib; cargo test -p qp-plonky2-verifier circuit_data --lib.

Merkle leaves now hash domain_tag || length || payload, internal nodes use a distinct domain tag, and native/recursive Merkle verification paths share the secure encoding; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- merkle; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 merkle --lib; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 hash --lib.

PackedStridedView::view now rejects reversed ranges and uses checked range length/stride-offset arithmetic before constructing subviews; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness --release -- reversed_ranges_forge_oob_views; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 strided_view --lib --release.

PackedStridedView::new now validates offset < stride and uses checked_add for offset + P::WIDTH before constructing the view; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness --release -- packed_strided_view_offset_overflow; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 strided_view --lib --release.

Standalone and batch FRI verifiers validate exact challenge, query-round, cap, opening, and batch-reduction shapes before indexed verification loops; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- empty_query_indices_skip_all_standalone_fri_checks; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- empty_query_indices_skip_all_batch_fri_checks; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- fri_; cargo test -p qp-plonky2-core fri --lib; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 batch_fri --lib; cargo test -p qp-plonky2-verifier fri --lib.
